ai.title: 🧠 AI Chatbot Feature
ai.description:
Our AI chatbot can be enabled on your server through Patreon.

**How to enable it:**
1. Any guild member can run `/link-patreon` to start the linking process.
2. Authenticate with your Patreon account — this links your subscription to the server.
3. Once linked, **all members** of the server can use the AI chatbot.

**Tiers & Rate Limits:**
• **Supporter** ($5/mo) — Basic access
• **Contributor** ($10/mo) — Higher rate limit
• **Champion** ($20/mo) — Highest rate limit

**How to use it:**
• Mention **DeadlockAssistant** in a message to start a new conversation.
• Reply to the bot's message to continue the conversation.

**Other commands:**
• `/link-patreon` — Link your Patreon account
• `/patreon-status` — Check current Patreon status for this server
ai.footer: Need help? Join our support server

language.set_success: ✅ You have successfully set the language for this server to '{{selectedLanguage}}'
language.set_fail: ❌ Failed to change this server's language: {{error}}

history.steam_auth_required_description:
Your Steam account is linked but not authenticated due to being connected using an outdated method.

This method will soon be deprecated. To ensure continued access to the `me` shortcut and related features, please re-link your account using the `/store` command.

Thank you for your understanding!

store.success: You have successfully linked your Steam account: {{name}} ({{id}})
store.title: 🔗 Steam Account Authentication
store.description:
To enable the `me` shortcut in certain commands, we require you to authenticate your Steam account.

We only retain your **SteamID64**, which is used solely for account association within our system. No additional data is accessed or stored, and the authentication process does not grant us any control over your Steam account.

For more information, please review our [Privacy Policy](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1AwofbGUpWC0pmRcok1N99hja5_-lzzKOVWf0cmO1kb0/edit?usp=sharing).

link_patreon.title: Link Your Patreon Account
link_patreon.description:
Link your Patreon account to enable the AI chatbot for this server.

Click the button below to authenticate with Patreon. Once linked, all members of this server will be able to use the AI chatbot.

The link expires in **5 minutes**.
link_patreon.already_linked_description:
You already have an active Patreon link for this server.

**Tier:** {{tierName}} ({{tier}})
**Rate Limit:** {{rateLimit}} requests

To update your link, click the button below.

patreon_status.title: Patreon Status
patreon_status.no_link_description:
No active Patreon link found for this server.

Use `/link-patreon` to enable the AI chatbot.

<@{{displayedUserId}}> is looking for some feedback to level up their game! Check out their match and hit the **Post Feedback** button to share your thoughts.

Realtime map for the match: https://statlocker.gg/match/{{matchId}}/map
